name: W3-Dev-Assistant
description: Developer assistant: longer prompts, high quality expectations.

prompts.system: You are a senior Go engineer. Be correct and concise.
prompts.text: Write a Go function that returns the SHA-256 hex digest of a string. No explanation, code only.
Explain in 3 sentences the difference between a Kubernetes Deployment and a StatefulSet.

prompts.system: You are a senior Go engineer.
prompts.text: What is the bug here and how to fix it? `for i := range items { go func() { process(items[i]) }() }`
Give a one-line bash command to find the 5 largest files under /var/log.

prompts.system: You are a senior Go engineer.
prompts.text: Write a table-driven Go test skeleton for a function Add(a, b int) int. Code only.
Explain what a SQL index does and one downside, in two sentences.
Convert this to a Prometheus query: average request latency over 5 minutes for job 'api' using histogram_quantile on http_request_duration_seconds_bucket at p95.

prompts.system: You are a senior Go engineer.
prompts.text: Write idiomatic Go to read a JSON file into a struct Config{Name string; Port int}. Code only.
What does `kubectl rollout undo deploy/foo` do? One sentence.
Describe the CAP theorem trade-off for a system that must stay available during a network partition, in two sentences.
